post.description: Create a new admin user linked to an existing organization.
Create a new candidate user with free plan.
Authenticate with email/password and receive JWT access + refresh tokens.
Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access + refresh token pair.
Revoke a refresh token. Idempotent — succeeds even if token already revoked.

schema.title: Response Logout Api V1 Auth Logout Post

get.description: Get the authenticated user's full profile. Requires valid access token.

get.summary: List interview windows visible to this candidate
get.description:
List interview windows the candidate can see:
- Global scope windows (visible to all)
- Windows where the candidate has existing submissions

List all submissions for the authenticated candidate,
including window/org/role info and interview results.

parameters.name: status

schema.description: Filter by submission status (e.g. completed, reviewed)
schema.title: Status

parameters.description: Filter by submission status (e.g. completed, reviewed)

get.summary: Get full submission detail with nested data
get.description:
Get a detailed view of a single submission including
window, role, template, result (with section scores),
exchanges (with evaluations, code submissions, audio analytics),
and proctoring events.

Returns aggregate stats: total interviews, average score,
pass rate, score history, and skill breakdown.

Get the full candidate profile including personal info,
skills, education, work experience, and social links.

put.description: Update the candidate's profile. Only provided fields are updated.

get.summary: List practice questions by skill and difficulty
get.description:
List available practice questions organized by skill area.
Includes completion status for the candidate.

List all active interview templates available for practice.
Returns template cards for the Interview Setup page.

post.summary: Start a new practice interview session
post.description:
Create a new practice interview submission.
Accepts template_id, experience level, and interaction modes.
Returns submission_id + session summary for the UI.

get.description:
Get all resumes for the authenticated candidate,
including parsed text and extracted data.

List all exchanges for an interview submission.

Returns the complete audit trail of question/response snapshots.
Supports optional filtering by section name and response inclusion.

Authorization:
- Candidate: can view own exchanges
- Admin: can view all exchanges

parameters.name: include_responses

schema.description: Include response data in exchange listing
schema.title: Include Responses

parameters.description: Include response data in exchange listing

get.description:
Get detailed section-level progress for an interview submission.

Returns overall progress and per-section breakdown calculated
from the frozen template snapshot and completed exchanges.

Authorization:
- Candidate: can view own progress
- Admin: can view any progress

post.description: Transition a pending submission to in_progress.

get.description: Return full session detail with exchanges.

post.description: Transition an in_progress submission to completed.
Admin-only: cancel a pending or in_progress submission.
Admin-only: mark a completed/expired/cancelled submission as reviewed.

get.summary: Get adaptation log for a submission
get.description: Returns all difficulty adaptation decisions for an interview submission, ordered by exchange sequence. Admin only.

schema.title: Response Get Adaptation Log Api V1 Questions Selection Adaptation Log  Submission Id  Get

post.description:
Trigger evaluation for a specific exchange.

Idempotent: if a final evaluation already exists and
``force_reevaluate`` is false, returns the existing evaluation (200).

post.summary: Human admin override of dimension scores
post.description:
Apply human overrides to selected dimension scores.

Creates a new evaluation version with ``evaluator_type=hybrid``,
marks the original as non-final.

Aggregate all exchange evaluations into a final interview result.

Delegates to the AggregationService pipeline.

get.description: Fetch evaluation by ID with dimension scores.
Fetch all evaluations for an exchange (optionally including history).

get.summary: Fetch interview results for a submission
get.description: Fetch interview results for a submission.

get.summary: Fetch supplementary reports for a submission
get.description: Fetch supplementary reports attached to a submission.

post.description: Submit source code for a coding exchange. Creates a submission with `pending` status and enqueues execution asynchronously.

get.description: Retrieve the execution status and test case results for a code submission. Hidden test case details are redacted.
List all code submissions for an interview. Returns summary only — no source code or detailed test results.

schema.title: Response List Submissions For Interview Api V1 Coding Interviews  Interview Id  Submissions Get

post.description: Accepts a proctoring event for processing. Non-blocking, advisory-only.

post.summary: Ingest a batch of proctoring events
post.description: Accepts up to 50 proctoring events for a single submission.

get.summary: Get risk score for a submission
get.description: Computes and returns the current risk score. Advisory-only.

post.description: Forces full recomputation of risk score. Admin only.

get.summary: List proctoring events for a submission
get.description: Returns all proctoring events in chronological order.

schema.title: Response List Events Api V1 Proctoring Events  Submission Id  Get

get.description: Returns flagged submissions sorted by risk score (highest first). Admin only.

post.description:
Start a new audio ingestion session bound to *exchange_id*.

Returns 201 on success, 409 if a session already exists.
Pause, resume, or stop an active audio session.

get.description: Return the current status of an audio session.

post.description:
Transcribe Base64-encoded audio data using the configured STT provider.

Primarily for manual testing and admin diagnostics.  The normal
production path is the internal ingestion → transcription callback.

get.description: Return the configured transcription provider and its readiness status.

post.description: Upload a file to the specified category container.

get.summary: Get a download URL for a file
get.description: Generate a time-limited SAS URL for downloading a file.

delete.description: Delete a file from the specified category container.

get.description: List files in the specified category container.
